info.title: Monster Hunter World API
info.description: The Monster Hunter World API provides detailed information about the game, including items, monsters, armor, skills, events, and more. It allows users to access various resources related to the game in a structured format, facilitating data retrieval and integration into applications.

get.description: Retrieves all ailments in Monster Hunter World

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Projection parameter for filtering returned fields

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Query parameter for searching

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Projection parameter for filtering returned fields

description.description: A short description of the ailment

actions.description: An array of actions that can be taken to remove the ailment

items.description: An array of items that can remove the ailment
An array of items that can prevent the ailment

skills.description: An array of skills that can prevent the ailment

id.description: The ID of the armor piece

name.description: The name of the armor piece

type.description: The slot the armor piece fits in

rank.description: The rank of the armor piece

rarity.description: The rarity of the armor piece

slots.description: An array of decoration slot information

attributes.description: Dictionary of attribute modifiers attached to the armor piece

skills.description: An array of skill ranks granted by the armor

max.description: The armor's defense value at max level

augmented.description: The armor's defense value when augmented

rank.description: The rank of the decoration slot

id.description: The ID of the skill rank

description.description: Description of the skill at this level

modifiers.description: Array of modifiers for the skill

id.description: The ID of the armor set

name.description: The name of the armor set

rank.description: The rank of the armor set

pieces.description: An array of IDs of all armor pieces in the set

imageMale.description: URL to the male preview image, or null if one does not exist

imageFemale.description: URL to the female preview image, or null if one does not exist

materials.description: An array of crafting material costs

quantity.description: The quantity of the item required

id.description: The ID of the armor set

name.description: The name of the armor set

rank.description: The rank of the armor set

pieces.description: Array of armor pieces in the set

carryLimit.description: The maximum number of this item that can be carried

sellPrice.description: The price when selling the item

buyPrice.description: The price when buying the item

skills.description: An array of skill ranks granted by the charm

slot.description: The slot rank required for the decoration

skills.description: An array of skill ranks granted by the decoration

exclusive.description: Whether the event is exclusive to a platform

expansion.description: The expansion the event belongs to

questRank.description: The quest rank of the event

startTimestamp.description: The start time of the event

endTimestamp.description: The end time of the event

zoneCount.description: The number of zones in the location

camps.description: An array of camps in the location

locations.description: Locations where the monster can be found

slots.description: An array of decoration slot information

damageType.description: The damage type of the weapon

id.description: The ID of the motion value
